title: Few More Swords
description: this mod adds swords and ways to craft them.
body:
This mod adds a few more swords to the game along with interesting ways to make them. The mod adds the ruby and ruboLight ores used to make blocks and _**SWORDS**_ thus the name of the mod. The mod adds,
- ruby ore
- ruby
- ruboLight
- sword smith workstation
- block versions of ores
- ruby sword
- ruboLight sword

and more in the future. Few More Swords is made for when you are tired of the old swords and want EVEN MORE swords to use. This mod attempts to fill your sword-y needs. Make sure to be aware that I am not amazing at making mods and their may be bugs.
